title: Dashboard sorting by x-axis error
excerpt: I recently tried sorting data in a chart by the x-axis in ascending order and ran into the following error: Monday interprets numbers (in my case week numbers) by checking the first digit of a number and ordering based o…

posts.author: VAdam (Adam Varadi)
posts.cookedHtml:
I recently tried sorting data in a chart by the x-axis in ascending order and ran into the following error: Monday interprets numbers (in my case week numbers) by checking the first digit of a number and ordering based on that. I.e. I got the following order after sorting: 1, 10, 13, 2, 3, 4, 49, etc.

image1825×748 45.7 KB

Please investigate and provide a resolution timeline as this is quite an important functionality for reporting for our use case. Thank you!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Adam,

Can you please clarify which column you’re measuring on the X-axis so we can investigate this?

posts.author: VAdam (Adam Varadi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @BiancaT ! Thank you for picking this up so quickly.
On the x-axis we are using data from a dropdown column type, where we predefined the week numbers - as multiple choices should be permitted.
Let me know if you need further clarification.

posts.author: VAdam (Adam Varadi)
posts.cookedHtml:
@BiancaT Have you managed to find out any specifics about this issue?
cc @dipro
